Twitter/X CLI and Go client library

Usage:
  gobird [flags]
  gobird [command]

Available Commands:
  about         Show account info for a user
  bookmarks     Fetch bookmarks
  check         Validate credentials and print current user
  completion    Generate the autocompletion script for the specified shell
  follow        Follow a user
  followers     List followers of the given account
  following     List users the given account follows
  help          Help about any command
  home          Fetch home timeline
  likes         Fetch tweets liked by the current user
  list-timeline Fetch timeline for a list
  lists         List owned lists (or memberships with --memberships)
  mentions      Fetch mentions of a user
  news          Fetch news from explore tabs
  query-ids     Print the current fallback query ID cache
  read          Read a single tweet
  replies       Fetch replies to a tweet
  reply         Reply to a tweet
  search        Search tweets
  thread        Fetch a tweet thread
  trending      Fetch trending topics
  tweet         Post a new tweet
  unbookmark    Remove a tweet from bookmarks
  unfollow      Unfollow a user
  user-tweets   Fetch tweets from a user timeline
  version       Print version information
  whoami        Print the currently authenticated user

Flags:
      --alt stringArray             alt text for the corresponding media file
      --auth-token string           Twitter auth_token cookie value
      --browser string              Browser to extract cookies from (safari, chrome, firefox)
      --chrome-profile string       Chrome profile name
      --chrome-profile-dir string   Chrome/Chromium profile directory or cookie DB path
      --config string               Config file path
      --cookie-source stringArray   browser cookie source(s): safari, chrome, firefox
      --cookie-timeout int          Cookie extraction timeout in ms
  -n, --count int                   Maximum number of items to fetch
      --ct0 string                  Twitter ct0 cookie value
      --firefox-profile string      Firefox profile name
  -h, --help                        help for gobird
      --json                        Output as JSON
      --json-full                   Output as full JSON (includes raw)
      --max-pages int               Maximum number of pages to fetch
      --media stringArray           media file path(s) to attach
      --no-color                    Disable ANSI color
      --no-emoji                    Disable emoji
      --plain                       Plain text output
      --quote-depth int             Quoted tweet expansion depth (default -1)
      --timeout int                 HTTP request timeout in ms
      --version                     Print version information

Use "gobird [command] --help" for more information about a command.
